dialogueChunks.intro: The rivalry over the {quest_focus} has turned ugly. Someone tampered with supplies meant for {quest_ally}, and suspicion falls on {target_npc}'s supporters.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Whether it's actual sabotage or just paranoia, the damage is done. Both sides are accusing the other while the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} eroding the settlement's cohesion. Nobody is willing to talk openly while suspicion poisons every conversation.
dialogueChunks.outro: Speak with people on both sides and find out what really happened. If {target_npc}'s people are innocent, clearing their name is the only way to mend this. If they are guilty, the settlement needs to hear it from a neutral voice.

dialogueChunks.intro: The competition around the {quest_focus} became public. {quest_ally} openly mocked {target_npc}'s abilities in front of the settlement, and now {target_npc} is refusing to contribute to any communal work.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: With {target_npc} on strike, the settlement is struggling. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} left gaps in our defenses, and morale is crumbling. {target_npc} will not listen to anyone who was there for the humiliation.
dialogueChunks.outro: You are an outsider: {target_npc} might hear you out. Talk to them and find a way to restore their dignity without letting {quest_ally} off the hook entirely. The {quest_stakes} can't afford this standoff.

dialogueChunks.intro: Both rivals have upped the stakes on the {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} ventured deep toward {location_hint} alone to prove a point and hasn't returned on time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is torn between concern and satisfaction. The area near {location_hint} is dangerous, and the {quest_threat} may have finally produced real consequences. People in the settlement are panicking.
dialogueChunks.outro: Talk to {target_npc} and convince them to help organize a search. If both rivals work together to bring {quest_ally} back safely, it might be the thing that finally ends this destructive competition.
